generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures load oscillation swing angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors wind speed for environmental conditions"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle measurements from load oscillation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed measurements for environmental monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CartMovementMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls cart movement along gantry track"
]

instance HoistingMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls hoisting movement of the crane"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Picks up containers at the end of the hoist"
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the lab-scale gantry crane"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the gantry crane system"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program that interfaces with crane controllers to collect physical data"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Application that streams crane state data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance LabScaleGantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Industrial research environment for lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, CraneController, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMovementMotor, HoistingMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication
]

instance C4ContextDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Context diagram of digital twin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance C4ContainerDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Container diagram of digital twin architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Gantrylib
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storage of crane operations and sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT messaging broker for real-time communication between physical and digital components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for real-time monitoring of system state"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for dissemination of digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Gantrylib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for C4 architectural model visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables C4ContextDiagram, C4ContainerDiagram
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes crane movement trajectories to enhance efficiency and safety"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of operational metrics for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataAccessInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive monitoring of system state through real-time data visualization and operator notifications"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfidenceBoundsInsight, NotifyOperatorAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compares digital model outputs against physical sensor data for accuracy validation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationStatusInsight
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Provides optimal movement trajectories for crane operation"
]

instance HistoricalDataAccessInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enables access to historical operational metrics for analysis"
]

instance ConfidenceBoundsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays confidence bounds derived from simulation results for validation accuracy"
]

instance NotifyOperatorAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically notifies operators via dashboard when system requires intervention"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports status of digital model accuracy compared to physical sensor data"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application sends control commands to the Physical Crane Interface to operate the physical crane. The Human Machine Interface and Trajectory Generator Service are part of the virtual system that may generate these commands, but specific technical details regarding command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, and command execution confirmation are not explicitly provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Uses C4 Model for architecture visualization with context and container diagrams to describe system components and their interactions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulated predictions using distance metrics to ensure model accuracy and trigger corrective actions for deviations exceeding predefined thresholds."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between services is facilitated via MQTT protocol using an MQTT Broker, with TimescaleDB as the data storage layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components are deployed on a single personal computer and containerized using Docker. Each service runs in isolated Docker containers for resource management and service isolation."
]
